name: Hotter Than Heck Horseradish Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the horseradish and garlic powder, blending well.
2. Add the sour cream and white pepper, again blending well.
3. Cover and chill.
4. Makes about 2 1/4 cups of dip.
5. Suggested dippers: Rolls of sliced roast beef, steamed cauliflower, bell peppers, potato chips, snow peas.
